args:
set -eu
PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"
PROJECT_DIR=$(pwd)
PROJECT_SETTINGS="$PROJECT_DIR/.codanna/settings.toml"
PROJECT_INDEX_DIR="$PROJECT_DIR/.codanna/index"

if ! command -v codanna >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Codanna is not installed. Install it with 'brew install codanna'." >&2
  exit 1
fi

if [ ! -f "$PROJECT_SETTINGS" ] || [ ! -d "$PROJECT_INDEX_DIR" ] || ! find "$PROJECT_INDEX_DIR" -mindepth 1 -print -quit 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then
  echo "Codanna is not initialized for this project: run 'codanna init' and 'codanna index .' in $PROJECT_DIR first." >&2
  exit 1
fi

codanna index . >/dev/null
exec codanna serve --watch
codanna.note: Apple Silicon macOS-only stdio launcher. Requires a globally installed Homebrew `codanna` binary in `/opt/homebrew/bin`, validates the current project's `.codanna` index, refreshes it, and then runs `codanna serve --watch`.
